allow: Bash(python -c "import fitz; doc = fitz.open\([f for f in __import__\('os'\).listdir\('.'\) if f.endswith\('.pdf'\)][0]\); print\('PAGES:', len\(doc\)\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName 'Microsoft.Office.Interop.Word' 2>$null; try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\('C:\\MacSoft\\RENACYT\\TitulaPro\\GUIA RAPIDA PARA LA OBTENCIÓN DE TÍTULO PROFESIONAL MODALIDAD TESIS_FACEAC_actualizada 28.10.2025.pdf'\); $text = $doc.Content.Text; $doc.Close\($false\); $word.Quit\(\); $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\($text.Length, 15000\)\) } catch { "Word COM failed: $_" })
